headline: Cognizant appointed by the UK Government as a strategic industry partner to its TechFirst programme
summary: The UK Department for Science, Innovation and Technology (DSIT) today announced Cognizant as a strategic industry partner to the Government's TechFirst programme, aimed at helping young people from all backgrounds find careers in technology as part of the UK AI Opportunities Action Plan.
